working: Alumni eNews - July 2026 (sent 7/9) is still the strongest recent send: 56.61% open, +77.2% traffic lift, and the only send with tagged email sessions (email_sessions_3d = 4).
Open rates continue to run about double the 25-35% health benchmark: 52.1% average across 100 campaigns; the two newest sends opened at 56.61% (Alumni 7/9) and 50.78% (Staff-Client 7/14).
GSC visibility improved sharply vs the 7/15 run: clicks 8 -> 25, impressions 1,459 -> 3,448, impression-weighted avg position 22.8 -> 18.64, and pages with impressions 67 -> 85.

The lift pattern is consistent: the three best 2026 sends are Alumni July (+77.2%), Staff-Client May (+66.5%), and the Alumni June final reminder (+65.2%) - alumni-focused content reliably moves site traffic.
not_working: UTM leakage remains near-total: across 88 sends, 3-day post-send windows show 5,472 Direct sessions vs only 4 Email sessions; GA4 credits Email with just 9 of 31,942 window sessions (0.0%) because newsletter links carry no UTM tags.
Staff-Client eNews - June 2026 (sent 7/14, 8,894 recipients) shows only +2.6% lift and 11 direct sessions in its (still partial) 3-day window - early read is weak for the largest list.
Referring Partners eNews - June 2026 (7/2) underperformed on every axis: 25.76% open (below benchmark and half the account average), -25.3% lift.
Click rates on recent sends sit well under the 2.03% account average: 0.78% (Alumni 7/9), 0.79% (Staff-Client 7/14), 1.15% (Partners 7/2) - opens are not converting to site visits.
Organic Social remains a minor channel at 5.4% of sessions (1,731 of 31,942) despite regular posting.
do_next: Add utm_source=constantcontact&utm_medium=email to all newsletter links - 5,472 post-send Direct sessions vs 4 tagged Email sessions means nearly all email traffic is mis-credited to Direct.
Repromote alumni-style content: alumni sends took the top three 2026 lift slots (+77.2%, +65.2% reminder, +66.5% staff-client May); the 7/9 Thursday-morning Alumni send is the working template.
Rework the Referring Partners newsletter (25.76% open, -25.3% lift) - test a new subject-line approach and send time before the July edition, since referral partners feed admissions directly.

Recheck Staff-Client eNews - June 2026 lift after its full 3-day window closes; if it stays near +2.6% on 8,894 sends, revisit content format - February's Staff-Client send earned a 3.85% click rate, the year's best.
Keep feeding the GSC momentum (clicks 8 -> 25, position 22.8 -> 18.64 vs last run) by continuing the staged blog/location-page publishing cadence.
summary: Email opens stay elite (52.1% avg) and the 7/9 Alumni send drove a +77.2% traffic lift, but with only 4 of ~5,500 post-send sessions tagged as Email, missing UTMs still hide the channel's real impact; GSC clicks tripled vs the prior run.
